name: triage filter rejects a PR whose author_type is Bot (e.g. dependabot, renovate)
command: printf '{"number":5,"merged":true,"author_type":"Bot","docs_only":false,"substantive_comments":3,"reviewer_requested_changes":true,"iterative_pushes":1}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/triage.sh" --pr pr.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=reject' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=bot-author' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
